original_query: SELECT "t6"."NAME" FROM (SELECT "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME" GROUP BY "t6"."NAME"
rewritten_query:
SELECT DISTINCT d."NAME"
FROM "EMP" e
LEFT JOIN "DEPT" d ON e."JOB" = d."NAME"
WHERE e."ENAME" = 'A';

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced GROUP BY with DISTINCT in the subqueries to achieve the same uniqueness with potentially better performance
Removed redundant outer GROUP BY since the subqueries already ensure uniqueness of the results
